name: active-flow stack records each line as valid NDJSON parseable independently
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/active-flow-push.sh" --flow a --pid 1 --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/active-flow-push.sh" --flow b --pid 2 --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z 2>err.txt && node -e "const lines=require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-tdd-pro/active-flow.stack','utf8').trim().split('\n');for(const l of lines){JSON.parse(l);}" && echo ok 1>&2
